requests.reason: CommandContract v2 ultimately requires registry-owned explicit risk, latency, JSON support, remote/Telegram allowance, input schema/profile, and required capability metadata. W04 implements the fail-closed runtime contract in its owned command-contract domain without editing the parent-owned registry.
requests.integration_note: Preserve W04's exact R3 deny and remote allowlists; registry metadata should replace the conservative owned-domain fallback after parent integration, not weaken it.
